substep.title: Read Bundle
substep.action:
From session state (handed off by code-orient or restored on resumption), capture: - {{bundle_dir}}, {{ticket_path}}, {{ticket_alias}}, {{ticket_slug}}, {{primary_tag}} - {{design_path}} (placeholder; will be populated by code-design later) - {{research_path}} (may not yet exist; created on first turn with findings)
Read the ticket file completely. Extract relevant facts into session: topic, AC, scope-boundary statements, depends_on, any linked DRs/ADRs in children.

substep.title: Read CONTEXT.md (refresh)
substep.action: Re-read CONTEXT.md (or CONTEXT-MAP.md). code-orient already loaded it, but a resumption session may have lost that state. Store as {{glossary}}.

substep.title: Read Prior Turns
substep.action:
If {{research_path}} exists, read it. Each "## Turn N: ..." section is a completed Q↔R turn. Store the count as {{turn_count}} (next turn = turn_count + 1).
Also re-read any DRs spawned during prior turns (listed in ticket frontmatter children). Their decisions constrain what this skill can revisit.
